message:
fix: explicit lock drop in obligation registry and use cast_signed() in timer

Two targeted improvements:

symbolic_obligation.rs:
- Add explicit drop(by_region) after pushing to the by_region index in
  register_symbolic_obligation to ensure the write lock is released
  immediately rather than held until end of scope

timer.rs:
- Replace `as i64` with `.cast_signed()` for the wrapping_sub result in
  TimerEntry::cmp(), using the safer Rust cast API that makes the sign
  conversion explicit and self-documenting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
